title: Incorrect result when using unnamed "?" bindings
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, age INT CHECK(age >= 0), email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE);
INSERT INTO users (name, age, email) VALUES (?, ?, ?);
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, amount FLOAT, FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
SELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE u.age > ?;
key_bug_features: Unnamed "?" bindings cause incorrect query results
